title: “I spent $50,000 self-hosting AI models. You should too.” - 0xSero
summary: A podcast episode argues that investing in self-hosted AI infrastructure, specifically mentioning spending $50,000 on local models, is a worthwhile endeavor. The guest discusses local AI deployment, GLM-5.2, and Fable-5 as alternatives to cloud-based AI services.
writeup: This podcast episode features guest 0xSero making the case for self-hosting AI models, anchored by an account of spending $50,000 on local infrastructure. The discussion covers local AI deployment as an alternative to cloud-based services, citing models including GLM-5.2 and Fable-5. The central takeaway is that running models locally is presented as a worthwhile investment rather than relying on hosted providers.
